_meta.description: Synthetic ULDK fixture — parcel with ~10% area mismatch (gate=hard). Used by F1-T5 validators tests and F1-T6 worker integration tests. Coordinates in EPSG:2180 (Zabierzów gmina area). WKT area computed via shoelace: 900.0 m². Declared area 1000 m² → diff −10.00% → gateLevel=hard. Distinct from Balice 773 (−16.36%) so tests can differentiate.
